title: lege-artis/jwst-l2-coupled-dynamics
description: Canonical reference implementation of two-rigid-body gravitationally-coupled dynamics, anchored on a JWST-like primary and a probe-like secondary satellite in deep space. Python reference layer + Fortran reference backend; canonical-tier mathematical documentation (English) covering configuration manifold on SE(3) x SE(3), kinetic energy in intrinsic form, mutual gravitational potential and multipole expansion, Euler-Lagrange and Euler-Poincare reduction with two-in-parallel methodology cross-validation, body-frame Euler equations as specialisation, and analytical limits with five closed-form validation testbeds. Cross-validated against Python oracle at Higham Option G tolerance.
notes: Companion arXiv preprint forthcoming. Citation metadata in CITATION.cff at repository root.
